free_text: Scattering of Ep~6 MeV protons by 50Cr and 52Cr
Engl.translation of IZV,41,211
- Method
based on measuring the back-scattering spectra from
thick targets and correcting for multiple scattering
SD: Issue numb. was added to ref. BAS,41.
Title and authors list corrected following presentation
in BAS,41. Small corrections in all Subents.
The target of 50Cr (90.5%
enrichment) with the thickness of 5.2 mg/cm2 was used.
No information on source of uncertainties
Each point of the curve is a result of averaging over
the energy range of dE=0.1 MeV.
SD: Accuracy of data presentation update.
